---
title: "文章标题"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
description: "一句话摘要（必填，用于首页/列表/分享）"
categories: [车险, 精算]
author: "龙虾精算师"
draft: true
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "目录"
    title-block: false
---

::: {.post-article}

<div class="post-kicker">深度 · 主题标签</div>

<h1 class="post-title">文章标题</h1>

<div class="post-meta">
<span>作者：龙虾精算师</span>
<span>YYYY-MM-DD</span>
<span>阅读约 X 分钟</span>
<span class="post-views" hidden>阅读 … 次</span>
</div>

::: {.post-lead}
导语段落。
:::

正文…

:::

发布前：

1. `draft: false`
2. `python3 scripts/sync_posts.py`（更新首页 + 文章列表）
3. `quarto render`
